groups.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements
groups.description: Configuration properties for the Stoplight Elements API documentation UI.

properties.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements.enabled
properties.description: Whether the Stoplight Elements UI endpoint is enabled.

properties.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements.path
properties.description: The URL path where the Stoplight Elements UI is served.

properties.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements.spec-url
properties.description: The URL of the OpenAPI specification to render.

properties.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements.title
properties.description: The HTML page title for the Stoplight Elements documentation page.

properties.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements.use-cdn
properties.description: Whether to load Elements JS and CSS from a CDN instead of the bundled versions.

properties.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements.cdn-js-url
properties.description: The CDN URL for the Stoplight Elements web component JS file. Used only when use-cdn is true.

properties.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements.cdn-css-url
properties.description: The CDN URL for the Stoplight Elements CSS file. Used only when use-cdn is true.

properties.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements.layout
properties.description: The layout mode: sidebar (default), responsive, or stacked.

properties.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements.router
properties.description: The router mode: hash (default), history, memory, or static.

properties.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements.hide-internal
properties.description: When true, filters out any content marked as internal with x-internal.

properties.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements.hide-try-it
properties.description: When true, hides the Try It feature completely.

properties.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements.hide-try-it-panel
properties.description: When true, hides the Try It panel while still displaying the Request Sample.

properties.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements.hide-schemas
properties.description: When true, hides the schemas in the Table of Contents (sidebar layout only).

properties.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements.hide-export
properties.description: When true, hides the Export button on the overview section.

properties.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements.try-it-cors-proxy
properties.description: URL of a CORS proxy used to send requests via the Try It feature.

properties.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements.try-it-credentials-policy
properties.description: Credential policy for the Try It feature: omit (default), include, or same-origin.

properties.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements.logo
properties.description: URL to an image displayed as a small square logo next to the title.

properties.name: springdoc.stoplight-elements.base-path
properties.description: Base path for history router when docs are in a subdirectory.

values.description: Three-column design with a resizable sidebar (default).
Like sidebar, but collapses to a drawer on small screens.
Single-column layout for integration with existing navigation.
Uses the hash portion of the URL (default).
Include credentials for same-origin requests only.
